overall.description: A nighttime scene from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) depicting a cowboy character walking alongside a horse on a dirt trail through open prairie, illuminated by a handheld lantern. The character mounts the horse mid-clip and continues riding toward a distant wooden settlement building under a starry sky.

events.description: character mounts the horse, transitioning from walking to riding

agents.ego_description: walking steadily alongside the horse, holding the reins with a lantern illuminating the path ahead

notable_agents.action: horse walking calmly beside the character, being led by the reins

entered.detail: winding dirt path through the prairie, illuminated by the lantern
tall grass covering the open plains on the left side of the trail
tall grass covering the open plains on the right side of the trail
solitary pine tree visible in the distance on the left
large rock outcropping silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside a horse on a dirt trail through open prairie grassland at night. A lantern casts a warm pool of light on the path ahead, revealing scattered trees and distant rock formations under a starry sky. The horse walks calmly beside the character until the mounting animation begins.

events.description: wooden settlement building with warm lit windows becomes visible on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: riding the horse at a steady pace along the dirt trail toward the distant settlement

notable_agents.action: horse being ridden at a steady trot along the trail

entered.detail: western-style wooden building with warm yellow light glowing from windows and doorway

segments.scene_description: Now mounted on the horse, the character rides along the prairie trail with the lantern swinging gently. The camera follows from behind as they approach a distant wooden settlement building that emerges on the right, its windows glowing with warm light against the dark landscape. The terrain remains open grassland with occasional trees passing by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark prairie landscape that transitions from a slow walk to a steady ride toward a distant settlement. It begins with the character walking alongside a horse on a dirt trail, where a handheld lantern casts a warm pool of light across the grassland and nearby rock formations under a starry sky. As the character mounts the horse, the perspective shifts to follow from behind, with the lantern now swinging gently in rhythm with the animal's gait. The scene then opens up as they ride further along the trail, passing occasional trees while a wooden settlement building emerges on the right. The journey finally culminates as the glowing windows of the building become more prominent against the dark, open horizon.
